title: Liebelei
writer: Arthur Schnitzler, Herbert Juttke, Georg C. Klaren
actors: Fred Louis Lerch, Henry Stuart, Jaro Fürth
plot: Silent version of the Schnitzler play later remade famously by Ophuls: during the Austro-Hungarian empire, honor is valued so highly that because of an affair of the heart, a young officer must fight in a duel.
